vulnerability.name: no-production-dependencies
vulnerability.description: This extension has zero production dependencies. All npm packages in package.json are devDependencies used only during development and CI. The published VSIX contains only compiled JavaScript with no third-party code bundled.

statements.impact_statement: All dependencies are devDependencies. No third-party code is included in the published VSIX package. CVEs in devDependencies do not affect end users.
